name: Aida
preceding_figure_names: Hand To Hand RSP, Reverse Top, Spot or Switch Turn To R (Lady to L), Three Cha Cha Chas Forward, Underarm Turn to L
following_figure_names: Time Step LF, Closed Basic Movement, Open Basic Movement
notes:
Aida Rock and Spot Turn Ending; Aida Switch an Underarm Turn to Right Ending; The chasse can be replaced with rocks as well.
Leader
2: RF back | 1/8 to R
When following Curl or Spiral, Man's steps are the same.
Increase tone in L arm. Lower L arm, and start rotating. Release R hand hold.
3: LF back to LSP | 1/8 to R
Slightly lower left arm and turn it with body over 2-5
4 & 1: Back Lock in LSP, RLR | No turn
Opening up the arms.
Follower
2: LF back | 1/8 to L
Keep arm at waist level, don't raise arm high.
When following Curl or Spiral, Man's steps are the same. Lady does:
2: LF fwd
3: RF fwd in line with LF to end RF back in LSP (turn 1/2 to L)
3: RF back to LSP | 1/8 to L
4 & 1: Back lock in LSP, LRL | No turn

steps.action: Back Lock in LSP, RLR | No turn

comments: Keep arm at waist level, don't raise arm high.

steps.action: Fwd in line with LF to end RF back in LSP (turn 1/2 to L)
Back lock in LSP, LRL | No turn
